title: Maxillariella tenuifolia

This epiphytic orchid belongs to the subtribe Maxillariinae, which consists of terrestrial and epiphytic orchids. It is further classified into the genus Maxillariella and the family Orchidaceae, and is a member of the plant kingdom. Maxillariella tenuifolia is a species within the order Asparagales.
